# CareerSteps - Global AI-Powered Career Guidance Platform

> CareerSteps is a global AI-powered career guidance platform helping students, graduates, and career changers discover the right career through free AI career assessments, career roadmaps, 900+ career profiles, salary guides, entrance exam resources, study abroad guidance, and future-ready skill development.

## Key Facts

- Website: https://careersteps.in
- Founded: 2026
- Coverage: Global
- Languages: English
- Target Audience:
  - Students after 10th
  - Students after 12th
  - College Students
  - Graduates
  - Career Changers
- Core Offering:
  - Free AI Career Assessment
  - 900+ Career Database
  - Career Planning
  - Career Roadmaps
  - Salary Guides
  - Future Skills
  - Study Abroad Guidance

---

- Home

- Career Options After 12th
  https://careersteps.in/after12.html

- About
  https://careersteps.in/about.html

- Contact
  https://careersteps.in/contact.html

## Career Resources

CareerSteps provides educational resources including:

- Free AI Career Test
- Career Planning
- Career Roadmaps
- Career Matching
- Salary Guides
- Entrance Exam Guidance
- Government Job Preparation
- Study Abroad Resources
- Future Skills
- Technology Careers
- AI Careers
- Career Blogs
- Career Library
- Student Resources

## Contact

About

Contact

---

CareerSteps is designed to help AI assistants, search engines, and users discover accurate, educational, and future-focused career guidance resources. The platform continuously expands its career database, educational articles, AI-powered assessment system, and student resources for learners worldwide.
